name_en: 【YSL Saint Laurent Premium Replica】Produced by overseas factories, original overseas stock, original factory hardware and leather, passes customs and counters easily. For high-end customers only. Medium size, counter best-seller. Logo buckle flip-top shoulder and crossbody bag. Leather uses original authentic fine grain toothpick grain Box calfskin, which is the best part of top-grade leather. Hand-rolled using an ancient method to preserve the natural feel, so the hand feel and flexibility are excellent, not too delicate, relatively durable. Front features a flip-top with a rotating YSL metal buckle. The new "L" letter opens half up and half down, designed by a famous watchmaker. The logo rotates open. A brand-new improved metal closure design that fits perfectly. Features elegant rounded leather quilting piping. Exquisite handcrafting. Adjustable leather shoulder strap, very comfortable to wear. Interior features a three-layer accordion pocket and a thoughtful card slot, easily accommodating daily essentials. Wear it elegantly on the shoulder or casually crossbody. The simple design and smooth lines make the style very versatile. Paired with the classic retro gold copper logo, it's truly a bag you'll love the more you look at it!
name_cn:
【YSL Saint Laurent Premium Replica】Produced by overseas factories, original overseas stock, original factory hardware and leather, passes customs and counters easily. For high-end customers only. Medium size, counter best-seller. Logo buckle flip-top shoulder and crossbody bag. Leather uses original authentic fine grain toothpick grain Box calfskin, which is the best part of top-grade leather. Hand-rolled using an ancient method to preserve the natural feel, so the hand feel and flexibility are excellent, not too delicate, relatively durable. Front features a flip-top with a rotating YSL metal buckle. The new "L" letter opens half up and half down, designed by a famous watchmaker. The logo rotates open. A brand-new improved metal closure design that fits perfectly. Features elegant rounded leather quilting piping. Exquisite handcrafting. Adjustable leather shoulder strap, very comfortable to wear. Interior features a three-layer accordion pocket and a thoughtful card slot, easily accommodating daily essentials. Wear it elegantly on the shoulder or casually crossbody. The simple design and smooth lines make the style very versatile. Paired with the classic retro gold copper logo, it's truly a bag you'll love the more you look at it!
Black, comes with full counter packaging
ˇSize: 23×16×6cm. Compared only with the counter. Exclusive stock control, for high-end customers only. We only do original development, not buying a fake on the market and then imitating it. Legitimate big factory goods, quality guaranteed. Do not compare prices with various versions on the market; the hardware and leather are far apart. Every detail is finely crafted, stitched, and oiled to ensure it meets counter quality requirements. Actual photos as shown, exclusive online channel.
【⭕️Warm Reminder⭕️】⭕️Attention! Attention! Attention!
⭕️⭕️⭕️Attention! Warm Reminder: Customers placing orders, please contact customer service to check stock before ordering. Only order if in stock. Do not order randomly. Do not order randomly.
⭕️Orders placed without contacting us will not be shipped. Thank you for your cooperation.
For shared platform orders, please confirm color, size, and style before ordering. Only order if you are sincere.
Do not order randomly! Do not order randomly! Do not!
Customers who immediately request a refund after ordering will be blocked. We ship as fast as possible every day. Please respect others' labor. We wish you have money and manners. Thank you to new and old customers for your support and love. We will work harder to provide better products and services. Every item is carefully selected. We do not sell seconds. Buy with confidence!
We only sell high-end goods for high-end people. Counter quality, high price. Serious buyers only.
⭕️We sell a product, not an artwork. Customers who are overly picky, please let each other go. Even counters have minor flaws.
